product_overview: CloudVault is a lightweight, Next.js-based cloud file management frontend that lets guests and registered users upload, organize, preview, and share files with realtime sync via Supabase and a TDLib/Telegram storage gateway.
core_goals: Enable fast, reliable file upload and preview for both guests and registered users
Provide simple folder and file management (create, rename, move, trash, restore)
Support public file sharing and secure downloads via TDLib service and Supabase metadata
Deliver realtime updates across open sessions using Supabase Realtime
Offer a responsive, mobile-first UX with guest-first onboarding

features.name: File Upload (Mobile)
features.description: Allow users to upload one or more files from mobile or desktop via the dashboard upload controls and show per-file progress and result state.
user_flows: Navigate to /drive -> Tap the Upload button in the dashboard header -> Select file(s) from the mobile file picker dialog -> See upload progress in the fixed bottom-right progress panel -> See success checkmark after upload

Navigate to /drive -> Tap Create dropdown then Upload File menu item -> Select file(s) from the mobile file picker dialog -> See upload progress in the fixed bottom-right progress panel -> See success checkmark after upload

Navigate to /drive -> Tap + New button in sidebar then File upload menu item -> Select file(s) from the mobile file picker dialog -> See upload progress in the fixed bottom-right progress panel -> See error message after upload when server returns failure

Navigate to /drive -> Tap the Upload button in the dashboard header -> Attempt to open file picker on some mobile browsers -> File picker fails to open -> See inline error toast 'Unable to open file picker' and guidance to use browser file input

features.name: Folder Upload (Mobile)
features.description: Allow users to upload an entire folder where supported (desktop and some browsers); on unsupported mobile browsers show a clear error or fallback.
user_flows: Navigate to /drive -> Tap + New in sidebar then Folder upload -> Select folder from file picker (desktop or supported browser) -> See upload progress in the fixed bottom-right progress panel -> See success checkmark after upload

Navigate to /drive -> Tap + New in sidebar then Folder upload -> Open file picker on an unsupported mobile browser -> No folder picker is presented -> See explanatory message 'Folder upload not supported on this browser'

features.name: File Management
features.description: Rename, star/unstar, move to trash, restore, and permanently delete files via context menu and trash view.
user_flows: Navigate to /drive -> Right-click or long-press on a file to open context menu -> Click rename option -> Enter new name in modal -> Click Confirm -> See updated file name in list
Navigate to /drive -> Right-click or long-press on a file to open context menu -> Click star/unstar toggle -> See file star state update in UI
Navigate to /drive -> Right-click or long-press on a file to open context menu -> Click move to trash -> See file removed from current view and appear in /drive/trash
Navigate to /drive/trash -> Click restore on a trashed file -> See file restored to its original folder in /drive

Navigate to /drive -> Right-click or long-press on a file to open context menu -> Click rename option -> Submit new name -> API returns error -> See inline error message 'Failed to rename file' and file name remains unchanged

features.name: Folder Management
features.description: Create new folders, rename them, and navigate into folder contents with breadcrumbs and nested structure.
user_flows: Navigate to /drive -> Click Create dropdown then New Folder -> Enter folder name in modal dialog -> Click Create button to submit -> See new folder appear in folder list
Navigate to /drive -> Click a folder -> Navigate to /drive/folder/[id] -> See breadcrumb with folder name and list of folder contents
Navigate to /drive -> Click Create dropdown then New Folder -> Open modal and submit empty name -> See validation error 'Folder name required' and modal remains open
Navigate to /drive/folder/[id] -> Right-click or long-press on a folder -> Click rename -> Enter new name -> API fails -> See error toast 'Unable to rename folder' and previous name persists

features.name: File Preview
features.description: Preview images, videos, audio, PDFs, and text inline in a modal and open a full-page preview when needed.
user_flows: Navigate to /drive -> Click on a file card to open preview modal -> View image, video, audio, or PDF inline -> Click Download in preview -> Begin download stream from /file/[...params]
Navigate to /drive -> Click on a file card to open preview modal -> Click 'Open full preview' -> Navigate to /preview/[id] -> See full-page preview
Navigate to /drive -> Click on an unsupported file type -> Open preview modal -> See 'No preview available' message and a Download button

features.name: File Sharing
features.description: Generate shareable public links for files and configure expiry or download limits via the share modal.
user_flows: Navigate to /drive -> Right-click or long-press on a file to open context menu -> Click Share option -> Set expiry or download limits in modal -> Click Generate -> See generated share link and Copy button -> Click Copy generated share link
Navigate to /share/[token] -> Open shared file page -> See public shared file view and Download button
Navigate to /drive as guest -> Right-click or long-press on a file to open context menu -> Click Share option -> See prompt 'Sign up to enable sharing' and option to go to /auth/signup

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allow users to sign up, sign in, use OAuth, or continue as a guest session with appropriate session handling.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Sign In button -> See dashboard at /drive on successful auth
Navigate to /auth/signup -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Sign Up button -> See confirmation and redirect to /drive
Navigate to /auth/login -> Click Google OAuth button -> Complete provider flow -> Hit /auth/callback -> See dashboard at /drive
Navigate to /auth/login -> Click Continue as guest -> Client creates guest_session_id and stores in localStorage -> Redirect to /drive -> See Guest Drive with guest-scoped files
Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill email and wrong password -> Click Sign In button -> See error message 'Invalid credentials' and remain on /auth/login

features.name: Search
features.description: Client-side search/filter input in the top bar to quickly filter files and folders in the current scope.
user_flows: Navigate to /drive -> Click search input in top bar -> Type search query -> See filtered file and folder results update in real-time
Navigate to /drive -> Click search input in top bar -> Type query with no matches -> See empty state 'No results for "<query>"'

routes.description: User login page with email/password, magic link, or Google OAuth
Main dashboard showing files, folders, upload buttons. Works for both authenticated users and guests.

features.name: File Upload (Mobile)
features.description: Upload files from mobile devices via file picker or drag-and-drop. On mobile, the primary interaction is tapping an Upload button which triggers a hidden file input via react-dropzone's open() method stored in UI store.
user_interactions: Tap the Upload button in the dashboard header
Tap Create dropdown then Upload File menu item
Tap + New button in sidebar then File upload menu item
Select file(s) from the mobile file picker dialog
See upload progress in the fixed bottom-right progress panel
See success checkmark or error message after upload
Drag and drop files onto the dashboard area (desktop only)

features.name: Folder Upload (Mobile)
features.description: Upload entire folders. Uses webkitdirectory attribute which is not supported on iOS Safari and many Android browsers.
user_interactions: Tap + New in sidebar then Folder upload
Select folder from file picker (if supported)

features.name: File Management
features.description: Rename, star, trash, restore, and permanently delete files
user_interactions: Right-click or long-press on a file to open context menu
Click rename option and enter new name
Click star/unstar toggle
Click move to trash
In trash view, click restore or delete permanently

features.name: Folder Management
user_interactions: Click Create dropdown then New Folder
Enter folder name in modal dialog
Click Create button to submit
Navigate into folders by clicking them

features.name: File Preview
features.description: Preview files in a modal or full-page view
user_interactions: Click on a file card to open preview modal
View image, video, audio, or PDF inline
Download file from preview
Navigate to full-page preview

features.name: File Sharing
features.description: Generate shareable public links for files
user_interactions: Open context menu on a file
Click Share option
Copy generated share link
Set expiry or download limits

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User login, signup, and guest mode
user_interactions: Fill email and password fields
Click Sign In button
Click Sign Up link to go to signup
Click Google OAuth button
Continue as guest (auto-assigned session)

features.name: Search
features.description: Client-side search/filter for files and folders
user_interactions: Click search input in top bar
Type search query
See filtered file and folder results

known_limitations.issue: Folder upload uses webkitdirectory attribute which is unsupported on iOS Safari and most Android browsers
known_limitations.impact: Folder upload silently fails or shows no folder picker on mobile devices

known_limitations.issue: Upload progress panel is fixed at w-80 (320px) with no responsive sizing
known_limitations.impact: May overflow or be clipped on small mobile screens (< 360px width)

known_limitations.issue: Upload progress panel does not account for safe-area-inset-bottom
known_limitations.impact: Panel may be hidden behind iOS home indicator or Android navigation bar

known_limitations.issue: No camera capture option for mobile photo uploads
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot directly take photos to upload, must use file picker

known_limitations.issue: Empty state text references drag and drop which is desktop-only
known_limitations.impact: Confusing UX on mobile where drag-and-drop is not available

known_limitations.issue: No chunked upload for large files on mobile
known_limitations.impact: Large file uploads may crash mobile browser tabs due to memory constraints

known_limitations.issue: react-dropzone open() may not trigger file picker on some mobile browsers without direct user gesture
known_limitations.impact: File picker may fail to open on mobile when triggered through indirect event chain (store → callback)
